response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience with C and C++ (including in a professional setting at National Instruments) and relevant financial-domain exposure (RIDE Capital, investment practices in Germany). However, their primary expertise lies in modern web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than C++ development. They lack explicit SQL Server/Oracle experience, Summit platform familiarity, and Windows-focused C++ work in recent roles, which are critical for this role.
strengths: 5+ years of C/C++ experience (National Instruments, LabsWindows/CVI)
Domain exposure to investment practices and capital markets (RIDE Capital)
Strong problem-solving skills and proactive approach to tooling (CI/CD, dev-ops infrastructure)
concerns: No recent or primary C++ development on Windows platform (last C++ role was 2014-2015)
Limited SQL Server/Oracle experience (only mentions MongoDB, MySQL)
Primary expertise in modern web stacks (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than C++ financial systems
